subcodes.first_line: O thou faithful friend! Couldst thou but know what stirrings of pure love and devotion surge within my heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الخل الوفی لو اطلعت علی ما یختلج بقلبی من هواجس الحب الخالص و الود
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
